---
title: "02_household_forecast_models"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(tseries)

source("../utils/helpers_forecast.R")
```

```{r Load processed data}
df <- readRDS("../output/eda_df_nodiff.rds") |>
  filter(date <= as.Date("2019-12-31")) |>
  arrange(date)

glimpse(df)
summary(df)
```
```{r data progressing}
df <- df |>
  mutate(
    gdi_qoq = (gdi / lag(gdi) - 1),
    gdi_yoy = (gdi / lag(gdi, 4) - 1),
    ldgdi = log(gdi) - log(lag(gdi)),
    dhh = hh_save - lag(hh_save),
    dcorp = corp_save - lag(corp_save),
    dnat = nat_save - lag(nat_save),
    dhh_rate = hh_rate - lag(hh_rate),
    dnat_rate = nat_rate - lag(nat_rate),
    dunemp = unemp - lag(unemp),
    dinterest = interest - lag(interest),
    ldcons = log1p(cons) - log1p(lag(cons)),
    ldcpi = log1p(cpi) - log1p(lag(cpi)),
    ldgpdi = log1p(gpdi) - log1p(lag(gpdi))
  )

glimpse(df)
```


```{r Build household modeling data}
model_df <- df |>
  transmute(
    date,
    y = dhh,
    gprev = lag(ldgdi, 1),
    cprev = lag(ldcons, 1),
    uprev = lag(dunemp, 1),
    iprev = lag(dinterest, 1),
    cpiprev = lag(ldcpi, 1)
  ) |>
  drop_na()

glimpse(model_df)
summary(model_df)

```



```{r Train and holdout split}
train_df <- model_df |>
  filter(date <= as.Date("2014-12-31"))

holdout_df <- model_df |>
  filter(date > as.Date("2014-12-31"))

ntrain <- nrow(train_df)
ntotal <- nrow(model_df)

cat("ntrain =", ntrain, "\n")
cat("nholdout =", nrow(holdout_df), "\n")
cat("ntotal =", ntotal, "\n")
```


```{r Convert to time-series objects}
start_train <- c(year(min(train_df$date)), quarter(min(train_df$date)))
start_all <- c(year(min(model_df$date)), quarter(min(model_df$date)))

train_y_ts <- ts(train_df$y, start = start_train, frequency = 4)
holdout_y_ts <- ts(
  holdout_df$y,
  start = c(year(min(holdout_df$date)), quarter(min(holdout_df$date))),
  frequency = 4
)
all_y_ts <- ts(model_df$y, start = start_all, frequency = 4)

autoplot(all_y_ts) +
  labs(
    title = "Household net savings change",
    x = "Quarter",
    y = "dhh"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r Benchmarks}
avg_obj <- avg_fc(as.numeric(train_y_ts), as.numeric(holdout_y_ts))
persist_obj <- persist_fc(as.numeric(train_y_ts), as.numeric(holdout_y_ts))
persist_q_obj <- persistbyperiod_fc(as.numeric(train_y_ts), as.numeric(holdout_y_ts), periodicity = 4)
iid_q_obj <- iidbyperiod_fc(as.numeric(train_y_ts), as.numeric(holdout_y_ts), periodicity = 4)

benchmark_tbl <- tibble(
  method = c("Average", "Persistence", "Seasonal persistence (quarter)", "Seasonal mean (quarter)"),
  rmse = c(avg_obj$rmse, persist_obj$rmse, persist_q_obj$rmse, iid_q_obj$rmse)
)

kable(benchmark_tbl, digits = 4)

```

```{r Optional additive seasonal exponential smoothing}
hw_obj <- tryCatch({
  hw_fit <- HoltWinters(train_y_ts, seasonal = "additive")
  hw_coef <- hw_fit$coefficients

  level <- unname(hw_coef[1])
  slope <- if (length(hw_coef) >= 2) unname(hw_coef[2]) else 0
  season <- unname(hw_coef[grepl("^s", names(hw_coef))])

  aseason_fc(
    train = as.numeric(train_y_ts),
    holdout = as.numeric(holdout_y_ts),
    alpha = hw_fit$alpha,
    beta = hw_fit$beta,
    gamma = hw_fit$gamma,
    level = level,
    slope = slope,
    season = season
  )
}, error = function(e) {
  list(rmse = NA_real_, fc = rep(NA_real_, length(holdout_y_ts)))
})

hw_obj$rmse
```

```{r Auto ARIMA on the stationary transformed household series}
hh_auto <- auto.arima(train_y_ts, seasonal = TRUE, stationary = TRUE)
summary(hh_auto)


arma_vec <- hh_auto$arma

order_vec <- c(arma_vec[1], arma_vec[6], arma_vec[2])
seasonal_vec <- list(
  order = c(arma_vec[3], arma_vec[7], arma_vec[4]),
  period = arma_vec[5]
)

include_mean_auto <- any(names(hh_auto$coef) %in% c("intercept", "mean"))

arima_obj <- arima_fc(
  tsdata = as.numeric(all_y_ts),
  ntrain = ntrain,
  order = order_vec,
  seasonal = seasonal_vec,
  method = "ML",
  traincoef = hh_auto$coef,
  include.mean = include_mean_auto
)

arima_obj$rmse
```


```{r Neighbor models around auto.arima}

candidate_specs <- tribble(
  ~name,         ~p, ~d, ~q, ~P, ~D, ~Q, ~period, ~include_mean,
  "auto_same",     0,  0,  1,  0,  0,  2,   4,      FALSE,
  "q_down",        0,  0,  0,  0,  0,  2,   4,      FALSE,
  "q_up",          0,  0,  2,  0,  0,  2,   4,      FALSE,
  "p_up",          1,  0,  1,  0,  0,  2,   4,      TRUE,
  "P_up",          0,  0,  1,  1,  0,  2,   4,      FALSE,
  "Q_down",        0,  0,  1,  0,  0,  1,   4,      FALSE,
  "p1q1_Q1",       1,  0,  1,  0,  0,  1,   4,      TRUE,
  "p1q0_Q2",       1,  0,  0,  0,  0,  2,   4,      TRUE
)

fit_neighbor <- function(name, p, d, q, P, D, Q, period, include_mean) {
  fit_try <- tryCatch(
    arima(
      train_y_ts,
      order = c(p, d, q),
      seasonal = list(order = c(P, D, Q), period = period),
      method = "ML",
      include.mean = include_mean
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      message(name, " failed in ML: ", e$message)
      NULL
    }
  )

  method_used <- "ML"

  if (is.null(fit_try)) {
    fit_try <- tryCatch(
      arima(
        train_y_ts,
        order = c(p, d, q),
        seasonal = list(order = c(P, D, Q), period = period),
        method = "CSS",
        include.mean = include_mean
      ),
      error = function(e) {
        message(name, " failed in CSS: ", e$message)
        NULL
      }
    )
    method_used <- "CSS"
  }

  if (is.null(fit_try)) {
    return(tibble(
      name = name,
      p = p, d = d, q = q,
      P = P, D = D, Q = Q,
      period = period,
      include_mean = include_mean,
      method_used = NA_character_,
      aic = NA_real_,
      loglik = NA_real_,
      rmse = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  fc_obj <- arima_fc(
    tsdata = as.numeric(all_y_ts),
    ntrain = ntrain,
    order = c(p, d, q),
    seasonal = list(order = c(P, D, Q), period = period),
    method = method_used,
    traincoef = fit_try$coef,
    include.mean = include_mean
  )

  tibble(
    name = name,
    p = p, d = d, q = q,
    P = P, D = D, Q = Q,
    period = period,
    include_mean = include_mean,
    method_used = method_used,
    aic = fit_try$aic,
    loglik = fit_try$loglik,
    rmse = fc_obj$rmse
  )
}

neighbor_results <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  candidate_specs,
  fit_neighbor
) |>
  arrange(rmse)

kable(neighbor_results, digits = 3)
```

```{r Regression benchmarks with lagged predictors}

reg_gdi <- lm(y ~ gprev, data = train_df)
summary(reg_gdi)

pred_reg_gdi <- predict(reg_gdi, newdata = holdout_df)
rmse_reg_gdi <- sqrt(mean((holdout_df$y - pred_reg_gdi)^2))

reg_full <- lm(y ~ gprev + cprev + uprev + iprev + cpiprev, data = train_df)
summary(reg_full)

pred_reg_full <- predict(reg_full, newdata = holdout_df)
rmse_reg_full <- sqrt(mean((holdout_df$y - pred_reg_full)^2))

reg_tbl <- tibble(
  method = c("Regression: lagged GDI only", "Regression: full lagged predictors"),
  rmse = c(rmse_reg_gdi, rmse_reg_full)
)

kable(reg_tbl, digits = 4)

```

```{r Residual diagnostics for the fuller regression}
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot.ts(resid(reg_full), main = "Regression residuals")
acf(resid(reg_full), lag.max = 20, main = "ACF: regression residuals")
pacf(resid(reg_full), lag.max = 20, main = "PACF: regression residuals")
qqnorm(resid(reg_full)); qqline(resid(reg_full))
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

```

```{r ARMAX with lagged predictors}
xcols_gdi <- c("gprev")

train_arx_gdi <- arima(
  train_df$y,
  order = c(1, 0, 0),
  method = "CSS",
  include.mean = TRUE,
  xreg = as.matrix(train_df[, xcols_gdi, drop = FALSE])
)

print(train_arx_gdi)

arx_gdi_obj <- armax_fc(
  tsdata = model_df$y,
  ntrain = ntrain,
  order = c(1, 0, 0),
  method = "CSS",
  traincoef = train_arx_gdi$coef,
  include.mean = TRUE,
  xreg = as.matrix(model_df[, xcols_gdi, drop = FALSE])
)

arx_gdi_obj$rmse
```

```{r lagged predictors}
xcols_full <- c("gprev", "cprev", "uprev", "iprev", "cpiprev")

train_arx_full <- arima(
  train_df$y,
  order = c(1, 0, 0),
  method = "CSS",
  include.mean = TRUE,
  xreg = as.matrix(train_df[, xcols_full, drop = FALSE])
)

print(train_arx_full)

arx_full_obj <- armax_fc(
  tsdata = model_df$y,
  ntrain = ntrain,
  order = c(1, 0, 0),
  method = "CSS",
  traincoef = train_arx_full$coef,
  include.mean = TRUE,
  xreg = as.matrix(model_df[, xcols_full, drop = FALSE])
)

arx_full_obj$rmse
```

```{r Compare all methods}
rmse_tbl <- tibble(
  method = c(
    "Average",
    "Persistence",
    "Seasonal persistence (quarter)",
    "Seasonal mean (quarter)",
    "Holt-Winters additive seasonal",
    "Auto ARIMA",
    "Regression: lagged GDI only",
    "Regression: full lagged predictors",
    "ARX(1): lagged GDI only",
    "ARX(1): full lagged predictors"
  ),
  rmse = c(
    avg_obj$rmse,
    persist_obj$rmse,
    persist_q_obj$rmse,
    iid_q_obj$rmse,
    hw_obj$rmse,
    arima_obj$rmse,
    rmse_reg_gdi,
    rmse_reg_full,
    arx_gdi_obj$rmse,
    arx_full_obj$rmse
  )
) |>
  arrange(rmse)

kable(rmse_tbl, digits = 4)
```

```{r Forecast comparison plot}
compare_df <- tibble(
  date = holdout_df$date,
  actual = holdout_df$y,
  average = avg_obj$fc,
  persistence = persist_obj$fc,
  arima = arima_obj$fc,
  reg_full = pred_reg_full,
  arx_full = arx_full_obj$fc
)

compare_long <- compare_df |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -date,
    names_to = "series",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(compare_long, aes(x = date, y = value, color = series)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Holdout-period forecasts for household net savings change",
    x = "Quarter",
    y = "dhh",
    color = "Series"
  )
```

```{r Pairwise comparison among top forecasts}
pairs(
  compare_df |>
    select(average, persistence, arima, reg_full, arx_full),
  main = "Pairwise comparison of holdout forecasts"
)

```
